root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR primarily adds list-partitioning test coverage. The available evidence does not indicate a targeted flaky-test stabilization change with a clear intermittent failure signature, so we conservatively classify it as insufficient evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
